_comment: Single source of truth for control-plane GUARD/POLICY env toggles. Read by BOTH infra/modules/containerAppControl.bicep (loadJsonContent, applied on full azd/postprovision deploys) AND scripts/dev/quick-deploy.sh (applied as --set-env-vars on every api/worker/beat PATCH, including the GitHub Actions deploy.yml path). Without this shared source, a fast/GHA deploy patches images only and never applies a Bicep env-default change (e.g. ENFORCE_DASHBOARD_RBAC), so a no-RBAC user could still load the dashboard after an apparent redeploy. Keep values as strings. Per-sidecar maps mirror the env arrays in containerAppControl.bicep; only the policy/guard toggles live here (operational vars like LOG_LEVEL and param-derived vars stay inline in Bicep).
